creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175801
combo patch for website

I am going through the website looking for stale information.  While here, I am finding various other problems.

This combo patch does several things:

 * cleans up some awkward wording on various pages
 * changes 'CVS repository' to 'source repository'
 * clarifies some information about the Ports Collection
 * adds an anchor to a link in the sidebar that goes to the Donations page
 * does some minor whitespace cleanup
